languages.text: {n}Себериан медленно кивает.{/n} "Должно быть, у тебя были причины привести чужа{mf|ка|чку} на совет. Хорошо. Я дозволю {mf|ему|ей} остаться".
{n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан медленно кивает.{/n} "Должно быть, у тебя были причины привести чужа{mf|ка|чку} на совет. Хорошо. Я дозволю {mf|ему|ей} остаться".

traits.locale_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."
{n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."
{n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

languages.text: {n}他缓缓点头。{/n}“你带一个陌生人参加议会，肯定有充分的理由。好了，我允许{mf|他|她}留下。”
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}他缓缓点头。{/n}“你带一个陌生人参加议会，肯定有充分的理由。好了，我允许{mf|他|她}留下。”

languages.text: {n}Il hoche lentement la tête.{/n} « Si tu as fait rejoindre le conseil à {mf|cet étranger|cette étrangère}, c'est que tu as une bonne raison. Alors, soit. Je l'autorise à rester. »
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il hoche lentement la tête.{/n} « Si tu as fait rejoindre le conseil à {mf|cet étranger|cette étrangère}, c'est que tu as une bonne raison. Alors, soit. Je l'autorise à rester. »

languages.text: {n}Asiente lentamente.{/n} «Debe de tener buenas razones para traer a un{mf||a} foraster{mf|o|a} al consejo. De acuerdo, puede quedarse».
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Asiente lentamente.{/n} «Debe de tener buenas razones para traer a un{mf||a} foraster{mf|o|a} al consejo. De acuerdo, puede quedarse».

languages.text: {n}Yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Konseye bir yabancıyı getirmek için iyi bir nedenin olmalı. Pekâlâ. Kalmasına izin veriyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Konseye bir yabancıyı getirmek için iyi bir nedenin olmalı. Pekâlâ. Kalmasına izin veriyorum."

languages.text: {n}Er nickt langsam.{/n} "Ihr müsst gute Gründe haben, {mf|einen Fremden|eine Fremde} in den Rat einzuladen. Also schön. Ich gestatte {mf|ihm|ihr}, zu bleiben."
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er nickt langsam.{/n} "Ihr müsst gute Gründe haben, {mf|einen Fremden|eine Fremde} in den Rat einzuladen. Also schön. Ich gestatte {mf|ihm|ihr}, zu bleiben."

languages.text: {n}彼はゆっくりと首を振った。{/n}「会議に異人を連れてきたのには、きっと良い理由があったのでしょう。それでは、異人の滞在許可を認めます。」
languages.original_text: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."

traits.locale_text: {n}彼はゆっくりと首を振った。{/n}「会議に異人を連れてきたのには、きっと良い理由があったのでしょう。それでは、異人の滞在許可を認めます。」
